title: DLSA Siddipet Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: District Legal Services Authority, Siddipet (DLSA Siddipet)
short_info: District Legal Services Authority, Siddipet (DLSA Siddipet) Recruitment 2026: District Legal Services Authority, Siddipet has released the official notification for 1 Junior Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 34 years Age Relaxation: OC: 5 years, SCs/STs/BCs/EWS/Aboriginal Tribes in Agency areas/BCs: 10 years, Differently-abled: 10 years, Ex-Servicemen: as per Rule 12(1)(c)(i) of Telangana State and Subordinate Service Rules, Contract/Outsourcing employees in DLSA Siddipet: further 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Arts or Science or Commerce or Law, Knowledge or qualification in computer operation
qualification.details: Must have passed Degree in Arts or Science or Commerce or Law of a University in India established or incorporated by or a central Act, Provisional Act or a State Act or from any Institution recognized by the University Grants Commission or any other degree equivalent to such qualification. Must have knowledge or qualification in computer operation.

selection_process: OMR based examination (80 marks: 40 GK + 40 General English
90 minutes) Oral Interview (Viva-Voce) (20 marks) Certificate Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Siddipet Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: siddipet.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
